search_document:
User Request: Monthly order count.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Monthly Order Count
Type: chart
Description: Trend of orders placed each month
Title: Orders by Region
Type: table
Description: Count of orders grouped by region
Title: Total Orders
Type: kpi
Description: Total number of orders placed

sql_queries.title: Monthly Order Count
sql_queries.description: Trend of orders placed each month
sql_queries.sql: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', OrderDate) AS OrderMonth, COUNT(OrderID) AS OrderCount FROM Orders GROUP BY OrderMonth ORDER BY OrderMonth

sql_queries.title: Orders by Region
sql_queries.description: Count of orders grouped by region
sql_queries.sql: SELECT ShipRegion, COUNT(OrderID) AS OrderCount FROM Orders GROUP BY ShipRegion

sql_queries.title: Total Orders
sql_queries.sql: SELECT COUNT(OrderID) AS TotalOrders FROM Orders
